data.title: ZIPS Car Wash in Myrtle Beach unveils 2 renovated locations. Free car washes on Oct 28. Ribbon Cutting at 2089 US-501.
data.description: Two refurbished sites in Myrtle Beach are set to be revealed next week during a Ribbon Cutting Ceremony and FREE Car Wash Celebration. ZIPS, in collaboration with the Myrtle Beach Chamber of Commerce, invites everyone to attend the event on October 28th at 2pm at ZIPS Car Wash located at 2089 US-501. Visitors can enjoy complimentary car washes throughout the day on the 28th at both ZIPS on US-501 and 593 International Dr. Additionally, free Travelin’ Tom’s Coffee will mark the start of the Ribbon Cutting and will be accessible from 1pm to 3pm. Join us for this special occasion as we celebrate the transformation of these two locations!

data.title: Tutor.com wins 2025 CODiE Award for Best Customer Experience Solution in education. CODiE™ Awards honor innovative companies.
data.description: Tutor.com, a reputable online tutoring and education solutions provider, has recently won the CODiE Award for their education solution LEO®. This award recognizes the company for offering the Best Customer Experience Solution in the education sector. The CODiE Awards, renowned for honoring excellence in technology, evaluate various companies, and Tutor.com's achievement in this category further solidifies their position as a leading innovator.

data.title: NEDHSA launching NED Talk Series "Mind the Gap" for youth mental health in Northeast Louisiana.
data.description: Monroe, Louisiana - October 24, 2025 - The Northeast Delta Human Services Authority (NEDHSA) has unveiled the NED Talk Series, a dynamic initiative aimed at fostering discussions and taking steps to address important topics impacting the youth and communities. This platform seeks to spark dialogue, raise awareness, and encourage positive change in response to pressing issues.

data.title: U.S. businesses embrace AI-driven ESM for digital transformation, ISG reports.
data.description: In Stamford, Connecticut, a recent report from ISG reveals that a growing number of companies in the United States are embracing enterprise service management (ESM) as a crucial element for their digital business evolution. This trend signifies a substantial shift towards leveraging ESM to drive organizational efficiency and innovation. The rising adoption of ESM highlights its significance in enabling companies to navigate the complexities of digital transformation effectively.

data.title: Planet Smilez aims to address the national shortage of oral health professionals by supporting students from a young age.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, Planet Smilez announced plans to address the increasing shortage of oral health professionals in the country. They are creating a program to guide future providers through early exposure, hands-on learning, and mentorship. This initiative aims to support students from educationally disadvantaged backgrounds and is expected to impact thousands of aspiring oral health professionals.

data.title: Patten Properties sees 22% growth at The Estates of Texas Grand Ranch in Walker County with new clubhouse unveiling. Land sales event on Nov. 8.
data.description: Situated just North of The Woodlands, a new community with spacious 1 to over 3-acre homesites surrounded by trees offers residents the benefit of low taxes and no MUD fees. Located in New Waverly, Texas, Patten Properties is organizing a land sales event on Saturday, November 8th, 2025, from 10 a.m. to 5 p.m. at The Estates of Texas Grand.

data.title: Kellanova Brands launch limited-edition Fall/Halloween treats in Chicago, featuring seasonal snacks for various occasions.
data.description: In Chicago as of October 24, 2025, the Kellanova brands are introducing a delightful range of seasonal snacks suitable for various occasions such as cozy evenings, game day get-togethers, and even an adventure to the mystical Upside Down. With flavors ranging from pumpkin spice to inspired by enchanting cinematic experiences, the assortment of snacks promises a unique and delicious treat.
